name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or logs.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.1.0]
- tmux version: [e.g. 3.4]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari iOS 17, Chrome 124]
- CloudCode version / commit: [e.g. 0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Logs

```
paste logs here
```

</details>

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (network setup, agent being used, etc.).
